title: Crispy Peruvian Fried Fish
description: A traditional Peruvian dish, this recipe features crispy fried fish with a tangy twist.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: White fish, such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: Citrusy marinade
ingredients.notes: Combine juice of 1 lemon, 1 lime, and 1 orange

ingredients.name: Crispy coating
ingredients.notes: Panko breadcrumbs mixed with 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic powder

instructions: 1. Cut fish into 1-inch pieces and place in a shallow dish.
2. Pour citrusy marinade over fish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. In a separate dish, mix together crispy coating ingredients.
4. Remove fish from marinade and coat with crispy coating, pressing gently to adhere.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry fish in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
7. Remove fish from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve hot with agemono sauce, if desired.
